properties.name: Feature: 3.5E/PFRPG Subraces
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Adds a Subraces section to the Race record. Ctrl-drop a race onto it to copy it in as a new subrace (with its own Traits section). Applying a race with subraces to a character prompts for which one (auto-picked if there's only one), then applies that subrace's own traits alongside the base race's.
